note: Eval fixture registry for the v1 regression corpus. Covers every intent referenced by evals/regression-set/v1/**. This is a small example registry — the canonical Meterless runtime registry ships 131 intents + 8 topology vectors (see docs/intent-registry.md, 'Scale').

intents.description: Safe fallback when no registered intent clears the Reject band (score < 0.40). Responds conversationally, never routes to tools, never guesses a high-risk intent.
examples: What's the weather tomorrow?
hello there
what can you help me with?

intents.description: Draft a recovery action for stuck or at-risk deals — typically an email or call plan.
examples: Find me the top 5 stuck deals and draft recovery emails
The Acme deal hasn't moved in three weeks. What should I do?
Give me 10 at-risk renewals with recovery plans

intents.description: Read-only lookup of deal status, stage, value, or pipeline filters.
examples: What's the status of the GlobeX renewal?
Show me all deals in negotiation stage over $100k
Show me the Acme deal

intents.description: Write operation on a deal record: change stage, value, or ownership. High risk — requires explicit confirmation and signed contract review.
examples: Move the Initech deal to closed-won at $280k

intents.description: Draft an email for user review — never sends. Pulls account context and prior preferences when available.
examples: Draft an outreach email to Maya at Acme about renewal
Write a follow-up to yesterday's exec sync attendees
Email Maya about the renewal

intents.description: Summarize inbox threads or a mail window for an account or time range.
examples: Summarize this week's inbox from Acme

intents.description: Actually send email, including bulk sends. High risk — always requires approval; rate-limited per user and per surface.
examples: Send the launch announcement to all customers

intents.description: Research a topic across multiple sources and produce a structured comparison.
examples: Research the top 3 vector databases and produce a comparison memo
Compare LangChain, LlamaIndex, and Haystack

intents.description: Open-ended market or competitor research grounded in shared world state.
examples: What are competitors doing in the agentic IDE space?

intents.description: Plan a multi-step, multi-month project — decision-heavy, long-horizon work routed to the Markovian engine.
examples: Plan a 6-month migration of our analytics warehouse to Iceberg
Write out a step-by-step rollout plan for the new auth system

intents.description: Pull and summarize a report, metric set, or document collection.
examples: Pull the Q2 numbers
Summarize the Q2 board prep notes

intents.description: Create a calendar event or reminder for the requesting user.
examples: Schedule a check-in for next Tuesday
Put me a Friday review on the calendar

intents.description: Direct read-only query of shared world-model state about an entity (account, contact, deal). Referenced by the multi-intent corpus for the lookup half of composed prompts.
examples: Summarize the Acme account
